description: Default jarvOS skill bundle for planning, rule wiring, context hygiene, and cron safety.

optionalAdapters.name: qmd
optionalAdapters.reason: QMD is underlying markdown-search software, not a default jarvOS operating-system skill.

skills.name: workflow-execution
skills.purpose: Plan, track, package, execute, and verify non-trivial work.

skills.name: rule-creation
skills.purpose: Wire new behavioral rules into the right governance surface with enforcement assessment.

skills.name: context-management
skills.purpose: Maintain compact, coherent always-loaded context and durable memory routing.

skills.name: cron-hygiene
skills.purpose: Validate, audit, and maintain scheduled automation safely.
